command.drag_move_hint: Press and hold a resource to drag it, or tap it and then tap a lane.
command.empty_accountability: No accountability entries yet — add crews to track them
command.empty_channels: No tactical channels — open one for this incident
command.empty_description: Select an active incident or event to start building your command board. Lanes, role assignments, resources, and accountability will appear here.
command.empty_resources: No resources tracked yet — add apparatus, crews, or equipment
command.empty_structure: No lanes yet — add Divisions, Groups, or Staging to build the command structure
command.empty_timers: No timers running — add a PAR check reminder
command.end_command_confirm_message: This closes the incident command. The board becomes read-only in the incident history.
command.incident_files_delete_message: The file is removed from the incident for everyone; the incident log keeps a record.
command.incident_map_delete_message: It is removed from the incident map for everyone. The incident log keeps a record.
command.incident_map_empty_description: Frame the incident area, mark it up, and pin the view so everyone sees the same map.
command.incident_map_move_first: Move the map first, then save the view
command.incident_map_points: {{count}} point(s) — tap the map to add more
command.incident_map_tap_to_place: Tap the map to place the text
command.incident_map_view_saved: Map view saved — the board card now uses this framing
command.incident_maps_delete_message: The map and its framing are removed for everyone; the incident log keeps a record.
command.incident_maps_empty: No additional maps yet — add one for an area of operation.
command.incident_weather_at_call: At the call's location (no ICP set)
command.incident_weather_none: No active weather alerts for this location
command.lane_color_label: Lane Color (optional — colors this lane’s markers on the map)
command.lane_name_placeholder: e.g. Division A, Roof Group, Staging
command.limit_riding_help: Personnel that must be riding a unit for it to fit this lane. Checked when a unit is assigned; blocked or warned per Force Requirements.
command.limit_time_help: Rotation guidance in minutes. Leaving before the minimum flags the move; past the maximum the resource shows a Rotate badge. Nothing is removed automatically.
command.limit_units_help: How many units this lane should have. Below the minimum the lane shows as under-filled (never blocks); at the maximum, adding more units is blocked or warned.
command.location_geocode_hint: No pin set — the text will be geocoded on save
command.move_conflict_message: {{resource}} is already assigned to {{lane}}. Move it to {{target}}?
command.move_selected_hint: {{resource}} selected — tap a lane to move it.
command.need_close_confirm_message: The need is removed from the board; its audit history is kept.
command.need_close_confirm_unfilled: Only {{fulfilled}} of {{requested}} filled. Close it anyway because it is no longer needed?
command.need_description_placeholder: What is needed, where, by when
command.need_entities_none: No entities recorded for this request
command.need_name_placeholder: e.g. Fuel truck, 2 ambulances, light tower
command.need_note_placeholder: e.g. Engine 1 from a mutual aid partner
command.need_reason_called_off: Resource called off to another call
command.no_accountability: No personnel checked in to this incident yet
command.no_resources_in_lane: No resources assigned to this lane
command.note_internal_hint: Visible to command staff only — the log records who added it, not the text
command.note_public_hint: The note text is written directly to the incident log
command.objective_complete_confirm_message: It will be recorded as {{outcome}} and written to the incident log. This cannot be undone.
command.objective_name_placeholder: e.g. Primary search complete, Utilities secured
command.objective_note_placeholder: e.g. North wing cleared; south wing inaccessible
command.par_hint: Tap a PAR badge to toggle between OK and Pending
command.reopen_message: This call had a previous command that has ended. Reopen it to continue with its history, or start a new command.
command.reopen_message_with_time: This call's previous command ended {{closedOn}}. Reopen it to continue with its history, or start a new command.
command.resource_name_placeholder: e.g. Engine 3, Ladder 1, Mutual aid crew
command.role_placeholder: Pick a preset or type a custom role
command.start_command_description: Pick a template or start blank — templates can model ICS structures, security details, or event staffing plans like a fair or concert.
command.start_error: Failed to start command for this call
command.template_blank_description: Start empty and build lanes as you go
command.transfer_command_hint: Hand incident command to another user. The board stays shared.
